content:text:1:51.name: Heading
content:text:1:51.html: The Salvation Army of Pickens Red Kettle Ring Off
content:text:1:51.content: The Salvation Army of Pickens Red Kettle Ring Off
content:text:1:51.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:38:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:2:50.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:2:50.html: The Red Kettle Ring Off is a competition between participating Pickens County Schools. Each year, the schools team up with The Salvation Army of Pickens County to ring the bell outside a store location to raise money for The Salvation Army. The funds raised are used in our “Diversion Program” designed to prevent homelessness in Pickens County.
content:textarea:2:50.content: The Red Kettle Ring Off is a competition between participating Pickens County Schools. Each year, the schools team up with The Salvation Army of Pickens County to ring the bell outside a store location to raise money for The Salvation Army. The funds raised are used in our “Diversion Program” designed to prevent homelessness in Pickens County.
content:textarea:2:50.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:38:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:3:17.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:3:17.html: In an effort to expand the competition and raise more funds for our neighbors in need, you can volunteer to ring at any of our eight locations from November 14 to December 24. The funds each group raises will be added to the school’s total amount. On Saturday, December 6, each school will have volunteers at one of 23 special locations. The community is encouraged to come out and support their favorite school!
content:textarea:3:17.content: In an effort to expand the competition and raise more funds for our neighbors in need, you can volunteer to ring at any of our eight locations from November 14 to December 24. The funds each group raises will be added to the school’s total amount. On Saturday, December 6, each school will have volunteers at one of 23 special locations. The community is encouraged to come out and support their favorite school!
content:textarea:3:17.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:38:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:4:8.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:4:8.html: The school with the most funds raised from November 14 to December 24 is deemed the 2025 Red Kettle Ring Off Champion!
content:textarea:4:8.content: The school with the most funds raised from November 14 to December 24 is deemed the 2025 Red Kettle Ring Off Champion!

content:wysiwyg_basic:19:35.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:19:35.html:
1. Visit RegisterToRing.com

  2. Click “FIND A GROUP” to link to your school and to find available shifts

  3. Enter the zip code for your school location

  4. Your school should show up. Click on your Group highlighted in blue

  5. Enter the dates you want to search for and select the “city” and “location” you want

  6. Click on the location you want

  7. Click on the shift you want

  8. You will be prompted to sign in or create an account

  9. Click on “FINISH”
content:wysiwyg_basic:19:35.content:
1. Visit RegisterToRing.com

  2. Click “FIND A GROUP” to link to your school and to find available shifts

  5. Enter the dates you want to search for and select the “city” and “location” you want

  6. Click on the location you want

  7. Click on the shift you want

  8. You will be prompted to sign in or create an account

  9. Click on “FINISH”
